title: Automation to open Board or Link
excerpt: Is there an automation where a board/link/popup will open with a status change?

posts.author: MondayMyco (K)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there an automation where a board/link/popup will open with a status change?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @MondayMyco, I am afraid we do not natively support this type of functionality within our automations. To achieve this natively, I’d recommend copying/pasting the URL of the particular board or website into the link column, and manually selecting the link post status change. Alternatively, you could set up a recipe to notify you when the status is changed, and included the specific link in the notification message? I recognise this isn’t the most ideal process, and we will note this feedback for review
